name: Creole Tomato Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Red bell pepper, fine chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine all the ingredients.
3. Pour the mixture into a bread pan and select white bread setting on your machine.
4. Close the lid and press "Start."
5. Enjoy this colorful, nutritious bread with its unique flavor.
